name: THE PUNISHER
description: Expertly wielding a full arsenal of futuristic weapons, Frank Castle is a formidable one-man army. With a steadfast resolve to deliver justice to his enemies, The Punisher won't cease in his mission until every last round is fired!
lore: Caught in the crossfire of a mob hit that killed his family, Frank Castle clung to life through sheer force of will and his unquenchable thirst for vengeance. Unwilling to let more innocents suffer at the hands of criminals, Castle took the law into his own hands as the Punisher. Thanks to an experimental serum that vastly extended his lifespan, the Punisher’s war has continued into the far-flung future. As a member of the New Marvel Knights, his impressive arsenal has become a vital part of Black Widow’s crusade against Doom 2099.

abilities.name: Adjudication
abilities.description: Fire at enemies with Adjudication, his Automatic Rifle

stats.Damage Falloff: Falloff begins at 20m, decreasing to 85% at 40m

abilities.name: Deliverance
abilities.description: Fire at enemies with Deliverance, his Shotgun

stats.Damage Falloff: Falloff begins at 8m, decreasing to 40% at 15m

abilities.name: Final Judgement
abilities.description: Unleash two Gatling guns and missiles to attack enemies

stats.Casting: Rapid-fire projectiles that hit instantly and have a tracking trajectory
stats.Damage Falloff: Falloff begins at 20m, decreasing to 70% at 40m
stats.Crosshair Spread Radius (at 10m): Start with a spread radius of 0.6m, which reduces to 0.3m after 50 shots, and further decreases to 0.15m after 100 shots

abilities.name: Vantage Connection
abilities.description: Launch a hook to generate a cable that enables the Punisher to move rapidly by pressing F

abilities.name: Culling Turret
abilities.description: Deploy a Culling Turret that grounds Punisher and blocks damage from the front while dealing massive damage

stats.Casting: Rapid-fire projectiles that create a spell field upon impact
stats.Crosshair Spread Radius (at 10m): Start with a spread radius of 0.2m, which reduces to 0.1m after 10 shots, and further decreases to 0.05m after 20 shots

abilities.name: Scourge Grenade
abilities.description: Throw a smoke grenade forward to obscure enemy vision and leap backward

stats.Special Effect: Create a temporary smokescreen that obstructs vision

abilities.name: Warrior's Gaze
abilities.description: Retain vision of enemies that disappear from view for a short duration

stats.Special Effect: Retain vision of enemies that disappear from view for a short duration

received.name: CUTTING-EDGE TECH
received.description: The Punisher upgrades Black Widow's arsenal, adding a Pulse Mode to her Red Room Rifle. While the ability is active, using Straight Shooter fires a pulse beam that deals piercing damage

received.name: JUSTICE SENSE
received.description: Daredevil shares the location of his Sonic Pursuit target with The Punisher. At the same time, The Punisher can launch a devil-infused shock grenade to damage and blind enemies

received.name: Ancient Judgement
received.description: The Punisher rides atop Devil Dinosaur, restricting him to only Adjudication/Deliverance and Scourge Grenade while disabling other abilities. While mounted, Devil Dinosaur absorbs a portion of all damage inflicted on The Punisher

base.description: Shoot piercing bullets that carry a Damage Boost effect.

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Daredevil, the bullets break enemy summoned walls and shields more quickly.

base.description: Throw an Ammo Overload Device in the target direction. Upon entering the device's range, receive Faster Firing.

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Rocket Raccoon, the device grants Infinite Ammo.

stats.Special Effect: Adds unlimited ammo on top of the base effect
